title: Notifications and Web Fixes - 1.0.8.56
summary: Notification sounds actually play, urgent cash approvals can be approved from the notification itself, and confirmation prompts on the web now work instead of doing nothing. Plus sign-in links, tips, and payment recovery all behave.

changes.message: Notification sounds and haptics now play when something arrives - the Settings toggle was never wired to anything.
Urgent cash approvals can be approved or declined straight from the notification instead of opening a screen with no buttons.
On the web, confirmation prompts (clearing notifications, removing insurance, payment confirms) now actually appear instead of silently doing nothing.
Sign-in and sign-up links open the right screen instead of bouncing you to the map, and invite links no longer get mistaken for sign-in links.
A declined payment can be retried with another method instead of leaving you stuck.
Live bed counts stay fresh, your medical and insurance details are cleared properly on sign-out, and the app checks for updates when you return to it.
